name: PENN Entertainment, Inc.
summary: PENN Entertainment, Inc. is a gaming and entertainment company operating casinos and related hospitality services across the United States. The company offers gaming products and services including slot machines, table games, and sports betting. PENN also operates digital and interactive gaming platforms. It is publicly traded on NASDAQ under the ticker PENN.

products.name: Casino Gaming
products.description: Slot machines and table games offered at physical casino properties across the U.S.

products.name: Sports Betting
products.description: Interactive and retail sports wagering services offered to customers.

products.name: Interactive Gaming
products.description: Digital and online gaming products offered to customers.
